title: Vision Transformers for Medical Image Segmentation
description: Under review at IEEE Transactions on Medical Image Analysis. Exploring efficient Vision Transformer architectures for real-time medical image segmentation.

title: Hybrid Intelligence for Human Activity Recognition
description: In preparation - combining graph neural networks with symbolic AI for robust real-world activity recognition. Expected submission targeting top-tier conference.

title: Efficient Deep Learning on Edge Devices
description: Early collaboration with industry partners on model compression and quantization techniques for deployment on resource-constrained devices.

title: Interpretability in Deep Learning Models for Healthcare
description: Developing new techniques for understanding decision-making in clinical AI systems. Focus on saliency maps and attention visualization.
